title: Avatar
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Avatar wrapper composing the local Base UI Avatar primitive with Avatar image, fallback, badge, group, and group count styling.

examples.title: AvatarBadgeIconExample
examples.description: Avatar with fixture-local Plus icon badge.

examples.title: AvatarDemo
examples.description: Avatar demo with badge and group examples.

examples.title: AvatarDropdown
examples.description: Dropdown Avatar example represented by a fixture-local static dropdown shell.

examples.title: AvatarGroupCountIconExample
examples.description: Avatar group count with fixture-local Plus icon.

examples.title: AvatarRtl
examples.description: RTL Avatar layout example with local Arabic strings.

deviations.summary: Dropdown example uses a fixture-local static shell instead of an installable shadcn Dropdown Menu component.
deviations.rationale: This batch intentionally does not add shadcn/dropdown-menu. The static shell preserves the Avatar trigger and fixture coverage without adding runtime dependencies.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local Arabic constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic constants preserve the default RTL rendered output while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.

deviations.summary: Icon examples use local inline SVGs instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot include lucide-react. The inline Plus SVG preserves the visible icon examples as fixture-local markup.
